name: Improved ASCII STL Validator v6
description: Validates ASCII STL files for manufacturing suitability: checks manifold closure (open/non-manifold edges), inverted face normals via winding-order cross-product verification, and degenerate (zero-area) triangles. Fixes the hidden inverted-normal bug in stl_validator_provided.py. All 6 synthetic test cases pass (valid tetrahedron, inverted normals, open mesh, valid cube, degenerate triangle, partial inverted normal).
